channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: New Senua Game Reveal Used as a Way to Sell Ninja Theory to Suitors
item.description: Xbox is reportedly selling Ninja Theory, revealed through a new Senua game. This strategic move raises questions about Microsoft's gaming future.

item.title: Malicious JetBrains Marketplace plugins steal AI API keys from developers
item.description: Fifteen malicious plugins on JetBrains Marketplace have been identified, targeting developers to steal AI API keys. Aikido Security uncovered this alarming campaign.

item.title: WhatsApp working on yet another ephemeral feature on iOS
item.description: WhatsApp is developing a new ephemeral messaging feature for iOS, adding to its disappearing messages functionality. Details are emerging from beta builds.

item.title: Xbox Promises Gears Of War: E-Day Exclusivity Is Not A Limited-Time Fake Out
item.description: Xbox assures fans that Gears of War: E-Day will remain exclusive, dispelling rumors of a future PS5 release. The company aims to clarify its gaming direction.

item.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved Preview - Exclusive Hands-On Impressions Of The Bonus Missions
item.description: Game Informer shares exclusive hands-on impressions of new missions in the Halo: Campaign Evolved remake. Fans can expect exciting content.

item.title: Persona 4 Revival Game Announces New English Voice Cast
item.description: Sega reveals the English voice cast for the upcoming Persona 4 Revival game, set to launch on February 18. Notable actors join the cast.

item.title: Siri AI may have confirmed a major iPhone 18 design change
item.description: Siri AI hints at a significant design change for the upcoming iPhone 18. Details remain speculative but intriguing for Apple enthusiasts.

item.title: Sega Put Sonic’s DNA In A Chaos Emerald, Your Move Nintendo
item.description: Sega celebrates Sonic's 35th anniversary by introducing a life-sized Chaos Emerald containing Sonic's DNA. A quirky marketing move that sparks interest.

item.title: 5 New Apple Music Features Coming In iOS 27
item.description: iOS 27 introduces minor improvements to Apple Music, enhancing user experience without major changes. New features aim to streamline functionality.

item.title: Google’s June Pixel Drop expands AirDrop compatibility, creation tools, and Pixel Watch safety
item.description: Google's June Pixel Drop enhances AirDrop compatibility and introduces new creation tools for Pixel devices. Safety features for Pixel Watch are also included.

item.title: Commodore gets into the phone biz with Sailfish-powered retro 'Callback'
item.description: Commodore launches a retro flip phone, the Callback, powered by Sailfish OS. The device lacks modern features like email and social media.

item.title: Analyst says Xbox CEO Asha Sharma’s Next 100 Days will be about “the job she was Actually Hired to do,” with Mass Layoffs Looming
item.description: Analysts predict Xbox CEO Asha Sharma's upcoming focus will be on her core responsibilities amid looming layoffs. The gaming industry watches closely.

item.title: Snap Opens Preorders For Specs, True AR Glasses Shipping This Fall For $2195
item.description: Snap launches preorders for Specs, standalone AR glasses priced at $2195, set to ship this fall in select countries. Aiming to innovate in AR technology.

item.title: Steam Machine one step closer to launch as benchmarks surface online, here's how it compares to the Steam Deck
item.description: Benchmarks for the Steam Machine have surfaced, indicating progress towards launch. Comparisons with the Steam Deck reveal performance insights.

item.title: Nothing’s Ear (a), our favorite budget earbuds, are cheaper than ever ahead of Prime Day
item.description: Nothing’s Ear (a) earbuds are now $53.20, offering noise cancellation and great sound. A perfect deal ahead of Amazon Prime Day.
